mapper.select: SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_class_student cs WHERE cs.class_id = c.id AND cs.status = 1) as studentCount FROM sys_class c WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_class_student cs JOIN sys_class c ON cs.class_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND cs.status = 1
SELECT c.class_name as name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_class_student cs WHERE cs.class_id = c.id AND cs.status = 1) as studentCount FROM sys_class c WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.role, cs.join_time, si.student_number, si.class_name as admin_class, si.college FROM users u JOIN sys_class_student cs ON u.id = cs.student_id LEFT JOIN sys_student_info si ON u.id = si.user_id JOIN sys_class c ON cs.class_id = c.id WHERE cs.class_id = #{classId} AND c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND cs.status = 1
